3219720.name: The Raven Creek Massacre
3219720.description:
Welcome to Raven Creek

Raven Creek – a quiet, unassuming town in the American heartland – doesn’t usually make headlines. But on Halloween night, the shadows grow long, and the streets come alive with lights, music, and costumed crowds. It’s a night of celebration for most… but not for you.

You are David Anderson. You’re not here to party. Your purpose is darker – to move among the chaos, to strike, and to disappear without a trace. Every location is a new hunting ground, each with its own challenges, escape routes, and unsuspecting victims. The night is short, and there are many parties to visit.

Meanwhile, across town, Jack Marlowe moves through his own labyrinth. A hard-bitten investigative journalist, Jack is piecing together fragments of a story the authorities are desperate to bury. His search for the truth runs parallel to your deadly work, each step bringing him closer to uncovering what really happened in Raven Creek.

Details

The Raven Creek Massacre is a third-person stealth game set during the chaos of Halloween night. Combining tense stealth mechanics with horror elements, the game challenges you to stay one step ahead of AI-driven crowds and vigilant security. Navigate through richly detailed environments – from dimly lit suburban homes to bustling outdoor festivals – each presenting unique obstacles.

Time is a critical factor: every decision and action counts as the night grows shorter, increasing the pressure to act quickly but carefully. Engage in interactive executions that demand precision and timing, adding a visceral layer to your stealthy approach. You must move silently and efficiently, managing risks without revealing your presence, all while ensuring your path to escape remains clear.

Key Features

  • A dark and intense story told through two connected characters

  • Tense stealth gameplay focused on avoiding detection

  • Interactive executions that heighten immersion

  • Realistic AI that reacts dynamically to the player’s actions

  • Multiple Halloween-themed maps offering unique environments and challenges

Note from the developers

The game is currently in development, so screenshots may not represent the final version of the product. For the latest updates and more information about development, please join our Discord server.
